problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
